---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest a CLI flag, GUI improvement, or behaviour change
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does it solve?

<!-- Concrete situation, not abstract. e.g., "I want to filter `retitle list`
to only show the last 24 hours" -->

## What would the feature look like?

<!-- A new flag? A new GUI control? A new config knob? Be specific. -->

## What have you tried instead?

<!-- A `grep`, an `awk`, a manual rename? Helps me understand the gap. -->
